DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/email-secu.description: Deletes the job, removing it from all list and detail endpoints. Only jobs in a terminal state (`COMPLETED`, `CANCELLED`, `FAILED`, or `SKIPPED`) can be deleted. To stop an in-progress job without removing it, use the cancel endpoint instead.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/email-securit.description: Returns information for submissions made to reclassify emails. Shows the status, outcome, and disposition changes for reclassification requests made by users or the security team. Useful for tracking false positive/negative reports.
